hypothesis: In systems with three metastable basins A, B, and C, extending ASTRA to guide sampling onto the manifold where the conditional densities are equal for all three states (p(x|A)=p(x|B)=p(x|C)) will concentrate generated configurations at branch-point transition states characterized by a near-uniform three-state committor (qA≈qB≈qC≈1/3).
